data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: Spotify uses encryption to protect data integrity and privacy as it travels over networks.
data.technical_spec: TLS/SSL protocols are implemented for secure data transmission.

data.title: User Authentication
data.description: Secure user authentication processes are in place to prevent unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: OAuth 2.0 and multi-factor authentication are used.

data.title: Security Monitoring
data.description: Active monitoring of network and systems to detect and respond to security threats promptly.
data.technical_spec: Uses SIEM tools for real-time threat analysis and response.

data.title: Data Privacy Controls
data.description: Policies and technologies implement to protect user data and comply with privacy regulations.
data.technical_spec: GDPR compliance measures and user data anonymization techniques are employed.

data.title: Automated Patching Systems
data.description: Automated systems for keeping all software components up to date with latest security patches.
data.technical_spec: DevSecOps practices with CI/CD pipelines for continuous updates.
